title: Messenger Becomes Omen
location: Drowned altar beneath the Pisces tide-clock
situation: In a final rite, he discovers the last symbolic delivery is himself: his identity is inseparable from the message and consequence.
knows: He is both courier and artifact within the ritual chain
His ominous persona was preparation for this culmination
does_not_know: What form he will take after the rite
Whether memory of him will persist among recipients
If the cycle ends or renews with another messenger
